case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS STEVENS, BARNEY A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,135.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, BARNEY A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
